GitHub Actions adapter: upload artefact bundle and post summary link
context.yml opt-in gate and ci_platform adapter routing

riskAcceptances.decision: MEDIUM finding F-A1 (missing error path for unreadable artefact files) resolved in story artefact (AC4 exit message spec). Accepted at /review pass.
MEDIUM findings F-A1 (idempotency language) and F-C1 (missing permissions constraint) resolved in caa.2 story artefact. Accepted at /review pass.
AC1/AC2 live GitHub Actions runtime gaps accepted. Manual Scenario 5 in verification script documents confirmation path.
MEDIUM finding F-A1 (YAML parsing constraint not explicit) resolved in caa.3 story artefact (Architecture Constraints). Accepted at /review pass.
AC verification scripts not expert-reviewed (solo repo). Human tech lead review at draft PR stage is the mitigation. Applies to caa.1, caa.2, caa.3.
